output.summary: Successfully removed incorrect padding from CardsGrid section element to match DynamicContentCarousel pattern. Section now has only 'cards-grid' and conditionally 'dark bg-transparent!' classes. All padding is now handled by the container element in dark mode pattern.
output.revisionRequest: Remove py-10 sm:py-16 padding from CardsGrid section element - section should have no padding classes

filesModified.purpose: Removed incorrect padding classes from section element
changes: Section now has only: 'cards-grid' (always) and 'dark bg-transparent!' (when darkMode is true)
Padding is handled entirely by the container element via dark mode pattern (py-18 md:py-23)

filesModified.purpose: Removed incorrect padding classes from section element to match TSX
changes: Removed 'py-10 sm:py-16' from section class_name array
Section now has only: 'cards-grid' (always) and 'dark bg-transparent!' (when darkMode is true)
PHP and TSX are perfectly synchronized

before.container: 'container' + conditionally dark mode pattern with py-18 md:py-23
before.issue: Section had redundant padding that conflicted with container's padding

after.container: 'container' + conditionally dark mode pattern with py-18 md:py-23
after.correct: Section has no padding - all padding handled by container (matches DynamicContentCarousel)

warnings: Asset size warnings (pre-existing, unrelated to changes)

syncStatus.details: TSX and PHP section classes are identical. Both have only 'cards-grid' and conditionally 'dark bg-transparent!' - no padding classes.

lightMode.before: Section had py-10 sm:py-16 (40px / 64px) + container had no padding = 40px/64px total vertical padding
lightMode.after: Section has no padding + container has no padding (in light mode) = 0px vertical padding
lightMode.change: Light mode blocks will have less vertical spacing. This may need to be addressed if cards need spacing from surrounding content.

darkMode.before: Section had py-10 sm:py-16 (40px / 64px) + container had py-18 md:py-23 (72px / 92px) = 112px/156px total vertical padding
darkMode.after: Section has no padding + container has py-18 md:py-23 (72px / 92px) = 72px/92px total vertical padding
darkMode.change: Dark mode now has appropriate padding contained within the charcoal pseudo-element background (matches DynamicContentCarousel)

notes: Light mode blocks now have NO vertical padding on the section. This matches DynamicContentCarousel pattern where all padding is in dark mode only.
If light mode blocks need spacing from surrounding content, it should be added via block spacing settings or adjacent block margins, not built into the block itself.
The dark mode charcoal background pseudo-element now contains all the padding, creating a clean visual card effect.
nextSteps: 1. Section element has no padding classes in both light and dark modes
2. Dark mode pseudo-element background contains all padding (py-18 md:py-23)
3. Light mode blocks have appropriate spacing from adjacent content (may need block spacing adjustments)
5. Test page renders correctly with new padding pattern
